headline: Start the trial. See what your sessions show.
subhead: Fourteen days, full access. Your behavioral signals live from day one. No charge until the trial ends. One subscription covers every platform we support.

tiers.name: Meridian Core
tiers.description: The full real-time PSI monitor for active traders.
features: Real-time PSI — updated after every fill
Seven independent behavioral dimensions in one composite score
Baselines calibrated from your own session history
Native NinjaTrader 8 add-on — plus standalone Tradovate & Ironbeam apps in early access, one license
Intel workspace — monthly digest, PSI × P&L, weekday patterns, breakdowns & pre-session Risk Brief

tiers.name: Meridian Guard
tiers.description: Automated enforcement layer for active traders.
features: Guard System — rules that enforce themselves (6 triggers · 5 levels on NinjaTrader 8, 6 tiers on the standalone apps)
Strict Lock — one switch, set when calm, that holds every pause for its full window (no in-app early exit) and survives a restart
Hard limits — a standing max-contracts cap and blocked entry order types (off by default)
Trading Pause, Disconnect & firewall Cut that survive a restart
Edge-triggered rules with cooldowns — fire once, no spam

footnote: Meridian Core is billed at $49.99/month or $479.90/year after the 14-day free trial. Meridian Guard is billed at $69.99/month or $671.90/year after the 14-day free trial. Cancel any time before the trial ends and you will not be charged. One subscription covers every supported platform — NinjaTrader 8 today, Tradovate and Ironbeam in early access. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Meridian does not provide trading signals or investment advice. Results may vary.
